title: Savory Light Cozy Dutch Eggplant Stir-fry
description: This eggplant dish is a light and flavorful addition to any meal, perfect for a cozy dinner. It features tender, evenly cooked eggplant that’s seasoned with savory herbs and spices.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp soy sauce or tamari (for non-vegetarians)

instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat and add olive oil.
Season eggplant slices with salt, let sit for about 5 minutes to draw out moisture, then drain on paper towels.
Add garlic to the pan; sauté until fragrant and slightly golden, adding more oil if needed, about 1 minute.
Toss in drained eggplant and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until eggplant is tender but not mushy.
Drizzle lemon juice over vegetables and stir through the cumin. Serve warm with chopped parsley on top (optional).
Optional: For a drizzle, mix soy sauce or tamari into a spoonful of olive oil to make a quick glaze for serving.
